text.title: terraform Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for terraform as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using workspaces to separate production from development.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Workspaces share backend config and are not suitable for prod isolation. Use separate directories with separate state files instead.
